hT : T.Nonempty
Δ : Finset (AddChar G ℂ) := largeSpec (mu T) 2⁻¹
V : Submodule (ZMod q) G := (AddSubgroup.toZModSubmodule q) (⨅ γ ∈ Δ, γ.toAddMonoidHom.ker)
V' : Finset G := (↑V).toFinset
Δ' : Finset (AddChar G ℂ)
hΔ'Δ : Δ' ⊆ Δ
hΔ'card : Δ'.card ≤ ⌈changConst * exp 1 * ↑⌈1 + log (↑(‖mu T‖_[1] ^ 2 / ‖mu T‖_[2] ^ 2 / ↑(card G)))⁻¹⌉₊ / 2⁻¹ ^ 2⌉₊
hfΔ' : largeSpec (mu T) 2⁻¹ ⊆ Δ'.addSpan
W : Submodule (ZMod q) G := (AddSubgroup.toZModSubmodule q) (⨅ γ ∈ Δ', γ.toAddMonoidHom.ker)
mem_W : ∀ {x : G}, x ∈ W ↔ ∀ γ ∈ Δ', γ x = 1
⊢ W ≤ V
